requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — INDOCAL Conformity Certification and IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Dominican Republic BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——INDOCAL合格认证及IEC 62619作为多米尼加共和国BESS的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——INDOCAL合格認證及IEC 62619作為多明尼加共和國BESS的國際基準

summary.en: INDOCAL (Instituto Dominicano para la Calidad) is the Dominican Republic's national standards body and conformity assessment authority. INDOCAL adopts IEC standards as NORDOM national standards and administers the national conformity certification system for regulated products. Conformity certification from INDOCAL is required for products within the scope of applicable NORDOM technical regulations before market entry or installation approval. IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules and is the IEC standard most likely to be referenced or adopted as a NORDOM technical regulation for BESS battery safety in the Dominican Republic. IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Portable Applications) may be applicable to smaller-format battery components. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based EES systems) provides the system-level safety framework. Exporters must verify the current INDOCAL NORDOM regulated-product scope for stationary BESS cells, modules, and systems directly with INDOCAL before shipment, as the specific mandatory INDOCAL conformity certification obligation for stationary BESS had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date.
summary.zh: INDOCAL（多米尼加质量研究所）是多米尼加共和国的国家标准机构和合格评定主管机关。INDOCAL将IEC标准采纳为NORDOM国家标准，并管理受监管产品的国家合格认证体系。在适用NORDOM技术法规范围内的产品，须在取得INDOCAL合格认证后方可进入市场或取得安装批准。IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，也是最有可能在多米尼加共和国被引用或采纳为NORDOM技术法规的IEC标准。IEC 62133（便携式应用密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）可能适用于较小规格的电池组件。IEC 62933-5-2（电化学储能系统安全要求）提供系统级安全框架。出口商在出货前须直接向INDOCAL核实固定式BESS电芯、模组和系统的现行INDOCAL NORDOM受监管产品范围，因为截至本数据集日期，固定式BESS的具体强制性INDOCAL合格认证义务尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。
summary.zht: INDOCAL（多明尼加質量研究所）是多明尼加共和國的國家標準機構和合格評定主管機關。INDOCAL將IEC標準採納為NORDOM國家標準，並管理受監管產品的國家合格認證體系。在適用NORDOM技術法規範圍內的產品，須在取得INDOCAL合格認證後方可進入市場或取得安裝批准。IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，也是最有可能在多明尼加共和國被引用或採納為NORDOM技術法規的IEC標準。IEC 62133（便攜式應用密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）可能適用於較小規格的電池組件。IEC 62933-5-2（電化學儲能系統安全要求）提供系統級安全框架。出口商在出貨前須直接向INDOCAL核實固定式BESS電芯、模組和系統的現行INDOCAL NORDOM受監管產品範圍，因為截至本數據集日期，固定式BESS的具體強制性INDOCAL合格認證義務尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。

standards_or_laws: INDOCAL — Instituto Dominicano para la Calidad (Dominican Republic national standards body; adopts IEC standards as NORDOM; administers conformity certification; verify current regulated-product scope directly with INDOCAL)

IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; most likely IEC standard referenced in NORDOM for stationary BESS)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Portable Applications (may apply to smaller-format battery components)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard; may be referenced in SIE or project specifications)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as equivalents in Dominican Republic INDOCAL conformity certification or project technical specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory and comply with applicable INDOCAL conformity certification requirements in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被多米尼加共和国INDOCAL合格认证或项目技术规格接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据，并遵守适用的INDOCAL合格认证要求。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被多明尼加共和國INDOCAL合格認證或項目技術規格接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據，並遵守適用的INDOCAL合格認證要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025; not equivalent to IEC 62619 for Dominican Republic conformity purposes)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024; not equivalent to IEC 62619)

gap.en: Gap: INDOCAL conformity certification is the mandatory market-entry gate for regulated products in the Dominican Republic. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Dominican Republic INDOCAL certification or project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current INDOCAL NORDOM regulated-product scope for stationary BESS cells, modules, and systems to confirm whether mandatory conformity certification is required before market entry; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Dominican Republic BESS projects; (c) obtain IEC 62133 test evidence if applicable to the battery component format; (d) comply with applicable INDOCAL conformity certification procedures — which may include NORDOM-registered test evidence and an INDOCAL conformity mark; (e) confirm applicable IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence requirements with SIE, the project owner, and INDOCAL before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 差距：INDOCAL合格认证是多米尼加共和国受监管产品的强制市场准入门槛。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被多米尼加共和国INDOCAL认证或项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实固定式BESS电芯、模组和系统的现行INDOCAL NORDOM受监管产品范围，确认市场准入前是否须取得强制合格认证；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至多米尼加共和国BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）若适用于所涉电池组件规格，取得IEC 62133测试证据；（d）遵守适用的INDOCAL合格认证程序——可能包括NORDOM注册测试证据和INDOCAL合格标志；（e）在启动测试计划前向SIE、项目业主和INDOCAL确认适用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2证据要求。
gap.zht: 差距：INDOCAL合格認證是多明尼加共和國受監管產品的強制市場准入門檻。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被多明尼加共和國INDOCAL認證或項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實固定式BESS電芯、模組和系統的現行INDOCAL NORDOM受監管產品範圍，確認市場准入前是否須取得強制合格認證；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至多明尼加共和國BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）若適用於所涉電池組件規格，取得IEC 62133測試證據；（d）遵守適用的INDOCAL合格認證程序——可能包括NORDOM注冊測試證據和INDOCAL合格標誌；（e）在啟動測試計畫前向SIE、項目業主和INDOCAL確認適用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2證據要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where INDOCAL NORDOM technical regulations apply to BESS cells, modules, or systems; specific mandatory conformity certification scope for stationary BESS had not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with INDOCAL; IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for project acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; neither is equivalent to IEC 62619 for Dominican Republic purposes

source.publisher: INDOCAL — Instituto Dominicano para la Calidad (Dominican Republic national standards and conformity assessment body)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INDOCAL conformity certification is the mandatory market-entry gate for regulated products in the Dominican Republic. IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Dominican Republic INDOCAL conformity certification or project acceptance. Verify INDOCAL current NORDOM regulated-product scope for stationary BESS, confirm IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence requirements with INDOCAL, SIE, and the project owner, and engage an ILAC-accredited laboratory for IEC 62619 type testing before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] INDOCAL合格认证是多米尼加共和国受监管产品的强制市场准入门槛。IEC 62619是BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足多米尼加共和国INDOCAL合格认证或项目验收要求。出货前请核实INDOCAL现行NORDOM固定式BESS受监管产品范围，向INDOCAL、SIE和项目业主确认IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2证据要求，并聘请ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62619型式试验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] INDOCAL合格認證是多明尼加共和國受監管產品的強制市場准入門檻。IEC 62619是BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足多明尼加共和國INDOCAL合格認證或項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實INDOCAL現行NORDOM固定式BESS受監管產品範圍，向INDOCAL、SIE和項目業主確認IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2證據要求，並聘請ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62619型式試驗。
